🔥 *Vercel Labs Open-Sources Zero-Native: A Zig-Based Cross-Platform Native Application Framework*

Vercel Labs recently open-sourced zero-native, a cross-platform framework for native desktop applications. Zero-native bypasses Electron runtime in favor or native OS WebViews and claims to achieve smaller, more efficient native apps with minimal overhead.
